summary: The agent correctly calculates the Number Needed to Treat using the absolute risk reduction derived from patient outcomes in MI treatment arms. Although retrieval failed to supply a defined formula or conceptual basis for NNT, the method applied—based on well-established clinical trial metrics—is statistically sound and clinically appropriate.
